GeneralDescription.SourceString: You're not a Separatist, are you?
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: You're not a Separatist, are you?

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: The 501st's Torrent Company has set up outposts across the Island. Their mission? To root out members of the Separatist Alliance, by order of Chancellor Palpatine.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: The 501st's Torrent Company has set up outposts across the Island. Their mission? To root out members of the Separatist Alliance, by order of Chancellor Palpatine.
